decisions.title: Contract packaging

options.name: Split groundworks and main build packages

decisions.notes: Project brief currently prefers a single main contract, but an early groundworks split remains possible.

decisions.title: Courtyard drainage build-up

options.name: Concealed drainage channels with extra sump capacity

decisions.notes: Courtyard detailing will affect groundworks coordination and threshold levels.

decisions.title: Steel frame finish
decisions.notes: Depends on whether any steel remains visible internally.

decisions.title: Roof covering strategy

options.name: Cost-led pitched covering with standard warm roof links
Upgrade to premium standing seam / enhanced link detailing

decisions.notes: Warm roof link detailing is fixed; final finish level is still open.

decisions.title: Cladding species
decisions.notes: Courtyard treated as envelope for reporting; courtyard finishing tracked separately long-term.

decisions.title: Wall build-up / insulation thickness
decisions.notes: Trade-off between upfront cost and operational performance.

decisions.title: Large slider specification
decisions.notes: Applies to the two principal large openings in the living volume.

decisions.title: Solar control glazing

options.name: Targeted solar-control glass to south/west elevations

decisions.notes: Useful if overheating risk remains after passive shading review.

decisions.title: MVHR confirmation

options.name: Natural ventilation fallback with local extract only

decisions.notes: Project assumptions currently treat MVHR as likely.

decisions.title: Electrical allowance level

options.name: Enhanced lighting scenes and joinery-integrated power

decisions.notes: Needs coordination with kitchen, joinery, and external lighting decisions.

decisions.title: Kitchen cabinetry and worktops

options.name: Higher-spec fully bespoke cabinetry and worktops

decisions.notes: Current preferred supplier is Vermland at £24,000 ex VAT for cabinetry and worktops.

decisions.title: Appliance package
decisions.notes: Current working assumption is a £15,000 appliance spend.

decisions.title: Bath selection (1 bath)
decisions.notes: Single bath item for the family bathroom.

decisions.title: Shower package (3 showers)
decisions.notes: Applies across three shower locations.

decisions.title: Basin / sink selection (4 sinks)
decisions.notes: Includes family bathroom, ensuites, and powder room sinks.

decisions.title: Bathroom wall finish

options.name: Targeted tiling to wet areas only

decisions.notes: This one overlaps with finishes and should be coordinated before procurement.

decisions.title: Internal door specification
decisions.notes: Impacts second-fix joinery package and decorating scope.

decisions.title: Wardrobe extent
decisions.notes: Can be postponed or phased if contingency tightens.

decisions.title: Floor finish level

options.name: Polished terrazzo to c.100 sqm + engineered oak to 110 sqm + basic garage concrete finish
Higher-spec terrazzo and premium wide-board oak upgrade

decisions.notes: Current working assumption is polished terrazzo to the main living zones, engineered oak to the remaining house areas, and a basic non-polished garage concrete finish.

decisions.title: Decorating scope

options.name: Enhanced finish schedule with feature areas

decisions.notes: Can be held until later once rooms are fully coordinated.

decisions.title: EV charging allowance

options.name: Load-managed charger with future PV/battery integration

decisions.notes: Useful to coordinate with phase 2 PV and battery ambitions.
